objective: Compare 30 open-ended solver prompts on the same 24 fresh cases, build a reusable candidate archive, and identify complementary prompt ensembles without exposing hidden taxonomy or answers to Luna.
prompt_constraints: No tools, code execution, browsing, files, other agents, or external communication.
No named RuleWeave families or closed benchmark taxonomy.
All arms share one common prefix and one special assignment; only the worker lens changes.
Every arm sees the same two blocks and independently returns exactly five terms per case.
post_call_exploration: Score each prompt arm and both diagnostic 15-arm pluralities.
Measure the 30-arm oracle ceiling and pooled plurality.
Search hundreds of prompt subsets and generic selectors without additional model calls.
Use family labels only for post-hoc diagnosis, never for inference or deployable selector inputs.
Promote only systems that survive progressive fresh-case gates; do not run a large final validation without user approval.
